description: Audience-specific tone regression fixture — 30 scenarios across corporate, social, agency, luxury, unknown. Used by run_audience_tone_regression.py.

tone_families.professional: Polished, efficient, commercially direct. No emotional celebration language.
tone_families.warm_celebratory: Warm, enthusiastic, occasion-aware. Celebration language permitted.
tone_families.operational: Clear, logistics-focused, planner-friendly. Minimal emotional language.
tone_families.refined: Calm, understated, high-touch. No casual or over-enthusiastic phrasing.
tone_families.neutral: Neutral and professional. Safe fallback when audience is unknown.

records.subject: Board dinner — 12 July
records.body: Hi, I'm coordinating a board dinner for 14 on 12 July. We need a private dining room for a post-AGM dinner. Please confirm availability and minimum spend. Regards, James

tone_expectations.notes: Board dinner is a business event. No celebratory warmth.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 16 guests).

records.subject: Client workshop lunch — 20 guests
records.body: We're planning a working lunch for a client strategy day on 18 July. 20 people, private room required. Could you confirm availability and pricing? Thanks, Sarah

tone_expectations.notes: Client working lunch — business context, no celebration language.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 22 guests).

records.subject: Team dinner — 25 people — 5 August
records.body: Hi there, looking to book a team dinner for 25 people on 5 August. This is an end-of-quarter team event. Let me know what you have available. Best, Mark

tone_expectations.notes: Corporate team dinner — professional tone expected.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 30 guests).

records.subject: Executive dinner — 10 people
records.body: I need to book an executive dinner for 10 guests on 22 July. Confidential setting required. Please advise on availability and minimum spend. Kind regards, Catherine

tone_expectations.notes: Executive dinner — discreet professional tone required.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 12 guests).

records.subject: Product launch dinner — 30 guests
records.body: We're holding a product launch dinner on 8 August, 30 guests. Need private hire. Can you confirm capacity and pricing? Regards, Tom

tone_expectations.notes: Product launch dinner — commercial event, professional response required.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 35 guests).

records.subject: Investor dinner — 8 people
records.body: Good morning, I'd like to arrange a dinner for 8 investors on 15 July. Private room essential. Please confirm availability. Best, Lisa

tone_expectations.notes: Investor dinner — high-stakes professional setting, no warmth openers.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 10 guests).

records.subject: Leadership away-day dinner
records.body: Hi, booking a leadership away-day dinner for 18 people on 29 July. We'll need exclusive use of a room. Please advise. Thanks, David

tone_expectations.notes: Leadership event — professional, no social warmth.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 20 guests).

records.subject: Office birthday lunch — 12 people
records.body: Hi, we're celebrating a colleague's 50th birthday at work and would like to book a lunch for 12 on 10 July. Please confirm if you have space. Rachel

tone_expectations.notes: Office birthday lunch — even with social occasion, corporate booker means business-appropriate tone.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 14 guests).

records.subject: Birthday dinner for 10 — 19 July
records.body: Hi, I'd love to book a birthday dinner for 10 people on 19 July. It's my 30th and I want it to be really special! Thanks, Emma

tone_expectations.notes: Social birthday — warm celebratory language is appropriate and expected.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Semi-private dining area (up to 12 guests).

records.subject: Engagement dinner
records.body: Hello! My partner just proposed and we want to celebrate with our closest friends — about 12 people, dinner on 25 July. Do you have availability? Sophie

tone_expectations.notes: Engagement dinner — celebratory warmth is correct and expected.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 14 guests).

records.subject: Baby shower lunch — 16 July
records.body: Hi, I'm planning a baby shower lunch for a close friend on 16 July — around 15 people. Can you accommodate us? Thanks, Jess

tone_expectations.notes: Baby shower — celebratory social occasion, warm tone appropriate.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 18 guests).

records.subject: Anniversary dinner — 6 people
records.body: Hi, my husband and I are celebrating our 25th wedding anniversary with close friends — 6 of us on 30 July. Looking for a private dinner. Best, Helen

tone_expectations.notes: Wedding anniversary — social celebratory, warm tone is correct.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Semi-private dining area (up to 8 guests).

records.subject: Retirement dinner — 20 people
records.body: Hello, we'd like to throw a retirement dinner for a dear colleague — 20 guests on 3 August. Can you help? Many thanks, Patricia

tone_expectations.notes: Retirement dinner — social occasion, warm and celebratory tone appropriate.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 22 guests).

records.subject: Family gathering dinner — 18 July
records.body: Hi, I'm organising a family reunion dinner for 22 people on 18 July. We'd love a private room. Please let me know if this is possible. Thanks, Andrew

tone_expectations.notes: Family reunion — social, warm tone appropriate.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 25 guests).

records.subject: Hen party dinner — 8 friends
records.body: Hi there! Planning a hen do dinner for 8 girls on 11 July. Would love something a bit special! Thanks, Claire

tone_expectations.notes: Hen party — social celebration, warm enthusiastic tone is correct.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Semi-private dining area (up to 10 guests).

records.subject: Graduation dinner — 16 people
records.body: Hi, I'd like to celebrate my daughter's graduation with family and close friends — 16 people, dinner on 27 July. Warmly, Margaret

tone_expectations.notes: Graduation dinner — joyful social occasion, warm celebratory language is entirely correct.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 18 guests).

records.subject: Agency booking — corporate client dinner
records.body: Hi, I'm an event planner organising a dinner for one of our corporate clients — 20 pax on 14 July. Please confirm availability, minimum spend, and commission terms. Thanks, Victoria

tone_expectations.notes: Agency booking — operational, logistics-first. No emotional celebration language.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 22 guests).

records.subject: PA booking on behalf of CEO — dinner for 8
records.body: Hello, I'm the PA for our CEO and I'm arranging a dinner for 8 on 21 July. Please send availability and pricing. Best regards, Natasha

tone_expectations.notes: PA booking — operational, professional. No celebration language.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 10 guests).

records.subject: Agency — third-party client birthday — 15 guests
records.body: Hi, I'm planning a birthday dinner on behalf of a client — 15 guests on 6 August. My usual contact suggested your venue. Can you send me availability and min spend? Thanks, Karen

tone_expectations.notes: Agency planning for third-party client — even a birthday context does not justify social warmth openers.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 18 guests).

records.subject: Event agency — private dining enquiry — 24 guests
records.body: Dear team, we are an event management company looking to source a private dining venue for a client networking dinner — 24 guests on 17 July. Please provide availability and FAM rate. Best, Philippa

tone_expectations.notes: Event management company — operational, B2B tone. No celebratory language.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 28 guests).

records.subject: Concierge desk — VIP dinner enquiry
records.body: Good afternoon, I'm from Quintessentially and I'm arranging a private dinner for a VIP client — 6 people on 9 August. Please confirm availability and the relevant contact. Best, Charlotte

tone_expectations.notes: Concierge agency — professional, efficient. No emotional openers.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 8 guests).

records.subject: Agency multi-date enquiry — 30 guests
records.body: Hi, I source venues for corporate clients. I need availability for a dinner for 30 on either 23 or 24 July. Client is in financial services. Commission applies. Regards, Gemma

tone_expectations.notes: Multi-date agency sourcing — efficient, professional, logistics-first.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 35 guests).

records.subject: Private family office — bespoke dinner
records.body: Good evening, I represent a private family office and I am enquiring about an exclusive private dinner for 12 guests on 13 August. Discretion is essential. Yours sincerely, Alexander

tone_expectations.notes: Private family office — refined, understated. No casual or enthusiastic language.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 14 guests).

records.subject: VIP birthday dinner — 6 guests
records.body: Good morning, I am arranging a landmark birthday dinner for 6 guests on 1 August. We require the highest level of service and total privacy. Please respond at your earliest convenience. Kind regards, Arabella

tone_expectations.notes: Luxury birthday — refined and understated. Warm but not enthusiastic.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 8 guests).

records.subject: Ultra-luxury anniversary dinner
records.body: Dear Madam, my clients are celebrating their 40th wedding anniversary and require an exceptionally private and refined dining experience — 8 guests on 20 August. Please advise. Yours faithfully, Edward

tone_expectations.notes: Anniversary for ultra-luxury client — calm, gracious, understated.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 10 guests).

records.subject: High-net-worth client — exclusive dining experience
records.body: Hello, I'm arranging a dining experience for 10 high-net-worth individuals on 7 August. Absolute discretion and impeccable service required. Please confirm availability. Regards, Imogen

tone_expectations.notes: High-net-worth — poised, restrained, impeccably professional.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 12 guests).

records.subject: Titled guest — private dinner — 4 August
records.body: Good afternoon. I am writing on behalf of a distinguished client who wishes to host an intimate private dinner for 8 guests on 4 August. Utmost discretion expected. Yours, William

tone_expectations.notes: Titled or UHNW guest — gracious, restrained, no enthusiasm.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 10 guests).

records.subject: Exclusive tasting dinner — 6 guests — 16 August
records.body: Dear Sir/Madam, I am arranging a private fine dining experience for 6 guests on 16 August. Please confirm availability and provide your premium private dining options. Yours sincerely, Henrietta

tone_expectations.notes: Fine dining — restrained, poised, high-touch.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 8 guests).

records.subject: Dinner for 10 — no context
records.body: Hi, can you tell me if you have availability for a dinner for 10 people on 5 August? Thanks

tone_expectations.notes: Unknown audience — neutral professional fallback. No assumptions about occasion or tone.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 12 guests).

records.subject: Private dining — 20 July
records.body: Hello, please could you let me know if you have private dining available for 15 on 20 July? Regards

tone_expectations.notes: Unknown audience, no occasion context — neutral professional tone.

draft_prompt_variables.room_lines: Suggested room: Private dining room (up to 18 guests).
